In Oak’s Lab after the rival fight; need to exit the lab and continue the story outside.

### Action_reasoning
The bottom edge is unexplored, but lab exits are warp tiles at the bottom center. Previous warp attempts targeted out-of-bounds coords; the actual visible walkable exit tile is inside the map at (4,10) or (5,10). Use the warp tool on one of those bottom-center exit tiles.

### Actions
use_tool(warp_with_warp_point, (x_dest=4, y_dest=10))
